title: Microscopic Colitis
subtitle: Understanding and managing this common cause of chronic watery diarrhea
description: Clear, evidence-based information about microscopic colitis — what it is, why biopsies matter, treatment options, and how to manage flares. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
